revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-515

Gap coding (in a transponder)

A process of interrupting the response of a transponder into long and short pulses, like the morse code, for recognition purposes.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Gap coding}}
